Paschal Highschool: This was my Highschool and I met some of my closest friends here. I also enjoyed my teachers.
Pie Tap Restaurant+Bar: I worked at this restaurant for 3 years and became good friends with my coworkers. I enjoyed the community within this restaurant.
Kimbell Art Museum: I grew up going to this museum, and enjoyed learning about art.I am currently interning here, and love it.
Melt Icecream: My first official job, and I had the chance to work with my closest friends. Who I am still in contact today.
Terra Mediterranean: This is my moms favorite restaurant, and my older sister worked here when I was younger. I love mediterranean food.
Rockwood Go Kart Racing: My brother and I used to love going race car driving when we were younger. Ihave many memories at this place.
Braums: I have vivid memories of getting birthday cake icecream at this Braum's after school in Kindergarden. The only flavor I get at Braums is bithday cake.
Arts 5th Avenue: I used to perform at this location. My middle school would use this space for out theater performances.
Casa Azul: My sisters good friend owns this coffee shop. It has great coffee, and has unique drinks that are inspired by the Latino community.
Scat Jazz Lounge: This is a really fun location in Fort Worth. They have great music and my friends and I love going here.
